name: MECONIUM ILEUS
definition: small bowel obstruction ← desiccated meconium pellets impacted in distal ileum
dominant_finding: "soap-bubble" / "applesauce" appearance in RLQ (in 50-66%) ← admixture of gas with
discriminating_features: numerous dilated small bowel loops without air-fluid levels (fluid not present)
"soap-bubble" / "applesauce" appearance in RLQ (in 50-66%) ← admixture of gas with
multiple round / oval filling defects in distal ileum + colon
functional microcolon ← unused colon in antenatal obstruction
